title: erigeron wightii
intro: Erigeron wightii, also known as the Indian fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron wightii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of digestive problems. Erigeron wightii can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
